generatedBy: Phase 726 - Full Truth And UX Audit

items.notes: Live VEHU patient search and chart handoff proven in browser during Phase 726.
Legacy patient-search alias now emits a canonical Next redirect to /cprs/patient-search instead of serving a stale divergent shell.
Chart shell proven on cover and notes tabs for DFN 46, including note-detail drill-in.
Legacy chart alias now redirects to the canonical CPRS chart route and preserves slug normalization for cover-sheet, dc-summaries, ai-assist, tele-health, med-rec, and e-prescribing aliases.
Starter-template selection and draft-note generation proven with live session and CSRF flow.

Remote Data Viewer proven as a protected integration-status surface; it now names missing remote-data routes and unresolved tenant-backed registry state instead of collapsing those failures into fake empty remote-source posture.
Preferences page proven as a protected local settings surface; unauthenticated access now redirects to login instead of exposing editable controls.

Verification dashboard proven as a protected route; the page heading is corrected, live payload counts now match the exercised VEHU routes, and the final browser run settled at 21/21 passed, 0 failed.
Static landing page proven in browser with truthful unauthenticated copy and working navigation into the CPRS login route.

Portal account route proven after fixing the localhost-versus-127.0.0.1 API host mismatch and establishing both portal auth cookies during login; the authenticated page now loads real account info, device sessions, and clean sign-out behavior.
Portal activity log proven with live /portal/iam/activity data, working sign-in filtering, and verified clean sign-out after the /portal/iam/logout effect-proof fix.

Portal AI Help proven with live /ai/portal/education and /ai/portal/search responses after fixing the portal request/response contract mismatch and letting /ai/portal/* resolve auth and tenant context from the portal session.

Portal appointments proven with live /portal/appointments data and a truthful scheduling-mode badge after moving the badge fetch off clinician route /scheduling/mode and onto portal-authenticated /portal/appointments/mode.
Scheduling tabs proven after waitlist, recall, and runtime-error truth fixes.
Handoff empty-state, lifecycle flow, and integration-pending create-path messaging proven.
Ward totals and populated 7A GEN MED census table proven against live VEHU data.
Occupied-bed board proven with live ward selector and populated 7A GEN MED bed grid.
Admin operational dashboard proven against live VistA-backed metrics.
Clinic list and appointment-type tab proven against live VE CLIN LIST data.
Users, security keys, and menu search proven against live VistA data.
System status, TaskMan, error trap, and parameters tabs proven in browser.
Ward list, ward detail, and census tab proven after occupancy truth fix.
Institutions, divisions, services, stop codes, specialties, and site params proven.
Item master, vendors, and purchase orders proven after truth-label fixes.
Billing admin tabs proven after sentinel filtering and truthful field labeling.
Clinical setup tabs proven after truthful labeling of raw pointers and status codes.
Lab admin tabs proven after sentinel filtering and truthful field labels.
Pharmacy admin tabs proven after truthful route, schedule, and detail labeling.
Radiology admin tabs proven after sentinel filtering and truthful raw-field naming.
Quality admin tabs proven after reminder-detail and QA param truth fixes.
Workforce admin tabs proven after person-class and detail truth fixes.
Provisioning wizard proven end to end against live catalog data and persisted tenant creation.

Integrations console proven against the authenticated tenant with live VistA interop telemetry and message-browser drill-in after fixing the stale default-tenant requests and duplicate segment-row React keys.

Payer DB console proven against the live admin registry: 57 payer rows, working search, truthful empty capabilities/evidence/audit states, and stale SQLite copy removed so the page no longer misstates the backing store.

Payer directory console proven against live /rcm/payerops/registry/health, /payers, /registry/sources, and /registry/snapshots routes after adding strict response validation so unauthenticated access no longer reuses the authenticated zero-state registry, source, and merge UI.
Audit viewer proven against live immutable-audit routes after fixing the stats contract so global chain integrity no longer renders as BROKEN when /iam/audit/verify is valid.

Billing console proven against live /billing plans, subscription, usage, and health routes after aligning the page with the real session-scoped backend contract and adding a truthful metering snapshot route for the Usage tab.

Branding console proven against live /admin/branding/:tenantId, /admin/ui-defaults/:tenantId, and /admin/my-tenant routes after replacing the stale hardcoded default tenant with the current session tenant and surfacing real API failures.

Capability matrix console proven against live /rcm/payerops/capability-matrix and payer registry routes on a truthful zero-data stack; no matrix cells or payers existed, and the browser matched that empty-state contract exactly.

Certification console proven against live /posture/certification after fixing the unauthenticated crash path so auth failures render an honest error state and authenticated refreshes stay aligned with the 10/10 production posture payload.

Claims queue proven against live /rcm/claims/lifecycle and /rcm/claims/lifecycle/stats zero-state routes after fixing the unauthenticated view so auth failures no longer render the same empty-state copy used for a genuinely empty queue.

Claims workbench proven against live /rcm/claims/hmo/board, /rcm/claims/source-map, and /rcm/payers/rulepacks after fixing the unauthenticated false zero-state, the tab-style React warning, and the stale invalid VEHU example values on the create form.

Denials workbench proven against live /rcm/claims/lifecycle/denials zero-state routes after fixing the unauthenticated view so auth failures no longer render the same resolved-empty-state copy used for a genuinely empty denial queue.

Payments dashboard proven against live /payerops/payments/batches, /payerops/payments/reconciliation, /payerops/analytics/aging, and /payerops/payments/underpayments zero-state routes after fixing all four tabs so auth failures render truthful load-failure messages instead of fake empty-state data.

Payer-intelligence dashboard proven against live /payerops/analytics/payer-intelligence and /payerops/analytics/aging zero-state routes after fixing KPI and aging sections so auth failures render truthful load-failure messages instead of fake loaded empty-state copy.

PH HMO Console proven against live /rcm/payers/ph/hmos registry, stats, validation, and Maxicare LOA packet routes after fixing all four tabs so auth failures render truthful route-failure messages instead of fake empty or partial loaded states.

Remittance-intake dashboard proven against live /rcm/remittance and /rcm/remittance/stats zero-state routes after fixing document and stats auth-failure handling and removing the tab-style React warning exposed during live tab switching.

Payer-registry console proven against live /admin/payers, /admin/payers/stats, and /admin/payers/audit/verify zero-state routes after fixing registry, evidence, audit, and stats so auth failures render truthful route-failure messages instead of fake loaded zero-state UI.

PayerOps console proven against live /rcm/payerops health, stats, enrollments, loa, credentials, and adapters routes after fixing the unauthenticated fake offline and empty-state fallthrough across all four tabs.

Performance dashboard proven against live /admin/performance summary, profiles, budgets, and slow-queries zero-state routes after fixing the unauthenticated fake loading and empty-state fallthrough across all four tabs.

PH market dashboard proven against live /rcm/hmo/market-summary and /rcm/hmo/manifest populated routes after fixing the page to use API_BASE and render truthful auth/load failure messaging instead of crashing on HTML 404s or hanging on unauthenticated loading.

PhilHealth claims console proven against live /rcm/philhealth/claims zero-state route after fixing list/detail fetch handling so unauthenticated failures render truthful error messaging instead of the loaded empty-drafts state.

PhilHealth eClaims3 console proven against live /rcm/philhealth/claims and /rcm/eclaims3 zero-state routes after fixing adapter, drafts, submissions, denials, and spec-gate fetch handling so unauthenticated failures render truthful error states instead of fake zero-state or loading UI.

PhilHealth setup console proven against live /rcm/philhealth/setup zero-state route after fixing the initial load path so unauthenticated failures render a truthful page-level load error instead of blank facility fields, fake provider zero-state, and fake readiness counters.

Denial-cases console proven against live /rcm/denials and /rcm/denials/stats empty-state routes after adding strict response validation, truthful auth/load failure handling, and empty-pagination normalization so unauthenticated access no longer masquerades as a loaded empty queue.

Exports console proven against live /admin/exports/sources, /admin/exports/jobs, and /admin/exports/stats routes after adding strict response validation, separate load versus action errors, and fail-closed rendering so unauthenticated access no longer masquerades as an empty source registry.

HMO portal dashboard proven against live /rcm/hmo-portal/adapters, /rcm/hmo-portal/specialties, /rcm/hmo-portal/submissions, and /rcm/hmo-portal/submissions/stats routes after fixing shared fetch validation so unauthenticated access no longer collapses into fake empty adapter, specialty, submissions, or stats UI.

LOA work queue proven against live /rcm/payerops/loa-queue and /rcm/payerops/loa zero-state routes after fixing the initial load path so unauthenticated access no longer collapses into the same empty queue state used for a genuinely empty tenant.

LOA workbench proven against live /rcm/loa and /rcm/loa/stats zero-state routes after adding strict load validation so unauthenticated access no longer collapses into a fake empty request list or endless stats loading state.

Migration console proven against live /migration/health, /migration/templates, /migration/jobs, and /migration/stats routes after adding strict route validation so unauthenticated access no longer misreports fake OFFLINE health or fake empty job/template state.

Module-disabled guard page browser-proven as a static admin shell route: the query-string module name renders truthfully, and the Module Administration and Return to CPRS links remain the only live affordances in both authenticated and unauthenticated contexts.

Module validation console proven against live /admin/module-validation/report, /dependencies, /boundaries, and /coverage routes after adding strict route validation so unauthenticated access no longer hangs on misleading loading states across every tab.

Onboarding wizard proven against live /admin/onboarding and /api/modules/status routes after failing closed on unauthenticated session-load errors and fixing the modules step to use the real module catalog instead of dead route /api/modules.

Ops admin console proven against live /admin/ops/overview, /alerts, /store-inventory, and /runbooks routes after adding strict parallel fetch validation so unauthenticated access no longer renders a silent blank admin shell.

Coverage dashboard proven against live /admin/coverage score, specialties, gaps, and QA ladder routes after adding strict response validation and fail-closed load handling so unauthenticated access no longer crashes the CPRS content boundary.

Contracting hub proven against live /rcm/hmo/contracting dashboard routes after replacing stale relative Next fetches with API_BASE and strict response handling so auth/load failures no longer crash on HTML 404s or hang on a fake loading state.

Compliance dashboard proven against live /regulatory/* posture, frameworks, attestation-summary, and validator routes after replacing stale /api/regulatory calls with API_BASE plus tenant resolution and truthful page-level load failure handling.

QA dashboard proven against live tenant-scoped /qa/* routes after resolving the active tenant in the page, attaching X-Tenant-Id to requests, and failing closed on auth or tenant errors instead of falsely rendering QA Routes Disabled.

Pilot readiness console proven against live /admin/pilot/sites and /admin/pilot/summary zero-state routes after fixing the initial load path so unauthenticated failures render truthful auth/load messaging instead of the same empty-site and preflight guidance used for a successfully loaded empty pilot store.

Modules console proven against live manifests, marketplace, entitlement, feature-flag, and audit routes after fixing the Entitlements tab to use the flat /admin/modules/catalog response shape instead of crashing on manifest.name.

Break-glass console proven against live session, posture, and request flows, including a browser-originated request that surfaced as pending and was then denied cleanly with final stats of denied:2, active:0, pending:0.

Adapters console proven against live adapter-health, runtime-matrix, and RPC-coverage routes after fixing the RPC Coverage tab to render rpcName values truthfully and stop generating duplicate undefined row keys.

Alignment console proven against live score, gates, tripwire, snapshot, and summary routes, including safe browser-driven tripwire seeding and snapshot capture that reflected back through the API immediately.

Analytics console proven against live ops, clinical, events, export-health, and aggregation routes after fixing the event-buffer stats helper to return bufferUsage and categories so the UI no longer renders NaN% for live buffer metrics.

Queue console proven against live queue departments, tickets, stats, and public display-board routes after fixing protected tabs to fail closed on auth/load errors while preserving the legitimately public display board.

RCM console proven against live claims, payer-registry, connector-health, audit, submission-safety, and payer-db backend routes after adding a strict route-level bootstrap gate so unauthenticated access cannot fabricate OFFLINE, SQLite, and empty RCM workspace state.

Reconciliation console proven against live imports, payments, matches, underpayments, and stats routes after adding a strict route-level bootstrap gate for protected access and normalizing empty pagers from Page 1/0 to Page 1/1.

Reports console proven against live operations, integrations, audit, clinical-activity, and export-job routes after fixing the Clinical tab to call the real /reports/clinical-activity backend contract instead of dead route /reports/clinical.

RPC Debug console proven against live /vista/rpc-debug/actions, /vista/rpc-debug/registry, and /vista/rpc-catalog routes after switching the panel to API_BASE and failing closed on auth/load errors instead of rendering a fake zeroed debug console.

Service-lines dashboard proven against live /ed/board, /or/board, and /icu/metrics routes after making all three protected tabs fail closed on auth/load errors instead of hanging on fake loading states.

Support tooling proven against live /admin/support/diagnostics and /admin/support/tickets routes after adding strict response handling so unauthenticated access fails closed instead of rendering fake diagnostics and a fake empty tickets workspace.

Templates admin proven against live /admin/templates, /admin/templates/quick-text, and /admin/templates/stats routes after adding strict response handling so unauthenticated access fails closed instead of rendering fake empty templates, fake quick-text zero state, fake zero stats, or exposed specialty-pack actions.

Browser terminal proven against live /terminal/health, /terminal/sessions, and the /ws/console WebSocket gateway after adding a strict health bootstrap so unauthenticated access fails closed instead of mounting a fake loading terminal shell.

VistA admin hub proven against live /admin/vista/dashboard/operational metrics after adding strict response handling so unauthenticated access fails closed instead of rendering a fake loaded hub with placeholder quick stats.

Unified VistA admin console proven for the default System surface, the Security Keys subtab, and the embedded terminal after adding a protected bootstrap gate, active-subtab loading, and the correct /vista/admin/keys endpoint so unauthenticated access fails closed and the visible subtabs align with live /vista/admin/* routes.

Workflow manager proven across Definitions, Instances, Packs, Stats, and Switchboard after adding a protected bootstrap gate plus strict tab error handling so unauthenticated access fails closed and backend failures no longer collapse into fake empty-state workflow UI.

Inpatient operations proven across live ward census, bedboard, discharge-plan recovery, and partial movement history after adding a protected bootstrap gate plus explicit med-rec integration-pending handling so unauthenticated access fails closed and the missing /vista/med-rec/* contract no longer masquerades as a live workflow.

CPRS login proven against live /auth/session and /auth/login behavior: unauthenticated sign-on renders the truthful VEHU credential guidance, valid login redirects into patient search, and authenticated visits to /cprs/login redirect away instead of rendering a stale sign-on form.
